decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_first-second-ave-sbs' already exists in the registry with an identical payload — same project_name ('First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS'), project_type ('Select Bus Service'), borough ('Manhattan'), status ('planning'), description, and routes_served (['M15']). The observation source 2009_09_23_brt_1st2nd_cac2 is already listed among the registry record's source_ids. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that identity.
